de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature

Class NotBelowQuantifierFeature

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.BinaryFeature
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.NotBelowQuantifierFeature
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Feature

    public class NotBelowQuantifierFeature
extends BinaryFeature
    Binary feature that returns zero iff the position of the given rule app is not within the scope of a quantifier

    • Method Detail

      • filter

        public boolean filter(RuleApp app,
             PosInOccurrence pos,
             Goal goal)
        Description copied from class: BinaryFeature
        Compute whether the result of the feature is zero (true) or infinity (false)
        Specified by:
        filter in class BinaryFeature
        Parameters:
        app - the RuleApp
        pos - position where app is to be applied
        goal - the goal on which app is to be applied
        Returns:
        true iff the the result of the feature is supposed to be zero.

      • belowQuantifier

        private boolean belowQuantifier(PosInOccurrence pos)
        Returns:
        true iff the given position is in the scope of a quantifier
